name: excel_parse
description: Parse an Excel (.xlsx/.xls) file. Returns data rows, sheet names, column stats, and any errors.

sheet_name.description: Sheet name to read (optional, defaults to first sheet)

clean_data.description: Remove null rows and duplicates (default: true)

name: api_test
description: Test an HTTP API endpoint. Returns status_code, response body, headers, and response time in ms.

name: pdf_merge
description: Merge multiple PDF files into one output file.

file_paths.description: List of PDF file paths to merge

output_path.description: Output path for merged PDF (default: merged.pdf)

name: qr_code_generate
description: Generate a QR code image from any text or URL. Returns output image path.

text.description: Text or URL to encode in QR code

name: prompt_optimize
description: Optimize a prompt for better clarity, detail, or a specific goal. Uses heuristics.

context.description: Optional context dict for the optimization

name: json_schema_generate
description: Auto-generate a JSON Schema from a sample JSON string or dict. Saves to file if path given.

data_sample.description: JSON string or dict to infer schema from

name: data_clean
description: Clean a JSON data list/dict: remove nulls, deduplicate, strip special chars. Returns cleaned data and report.

data.description: JSON string of the data to clean

remove_special.description: Strip special characters from strings (default: true)

name: data_viz_chart
description: Generate a chart image (bar/line/pie/scatter) from labels and values. Saves PNG to output_path.

name: csv_transform
description: Convert a CSV file to JSON, Excel, or SQL INSERT statements. Returns output file path.

input_path.description: Path to the input CSV file

output_path.description: Output file path (optional, auto-generated if omitted)

name: sql_generator
description: Generate SQL queries from natural language descriptions with a schema context.

natural_query.description: Plain English description of the desired query

db_schema.description: JSON schema dict or string describing tables and columns

name: password_generate
description: Generate a cryptographically secure password with configurable complexity.

name: hash_verify
description: Hash a password or verify it against a stored hash. Supports bcrypt, sha256, sha512, md5.

hash_string.description: The stored hash to verify against (omit to generate hash)

name: jwt_decode
description: Decode a JWT token. Returns header, payload, expiry status, and signature validity.

verify.description: Whether to verify the signature (default: true)

name: ssl_check
description: Check SSL/TLS certificate for a domain: expiry date, issuer, validity.

domain.description: Domain name to check (e.g. google.com or https://google.com)

name: api_key_generate
description: Generate a secure API key. Supports uuid, secret (hex), or random (alphanumeric) types.

name: sitemap_parse
description: Fetch and parse a sitemap.xml URL. Returns list of URLs with metadata. Handles sitemap indexes.

name: webhook_test
description: Send a test payload to a webhook URL. Returns response status, body, and round-trip time.

name: seo_audit
description: SEO audit a URL: checks title, meta tags, headings, links, image alts, and load time.

name: og_preview
description: Extract Open Graph metadata from a URL for social media preview card.

url.description: URL to extract OG tags from

output_path.description: Path to save HTML preview file (optional)

name: link_checker
description: Crawl a URL and check all linked pages for broken links (4xx/5xx). Returns broken links and summary.

name: rpg_generator
description: Generate a random RPG character with stats, skills, equipment, HP, and XP.

character_class.description: Character class: warrior, mage, rogue, ranger, paladin

name: dice_roller
description: Roll tabletop RPG dice. Supports d4/d6/d8/d10/d12/d20/d100. Multiple dice + modifier.

name: random_quest_generate
description: Generate a random RPG quest with title, description, enemies, rewards, and challenges.

theme.description: Quest theme: fantasy or sci-fi (default: fantasy)

name: party_planner_guests
description: Generate a party planning checklist with budget breakdown for N guests.

budget.description: Total budget in smallest currency unit (default: 1000000)

theme.description: Party theme: casual, formal, birthday, wedding (default: casual)

name: quiz_generate_from_text
description: Generate quiz questions from a text block. Supports multiple_choice, true_false, open formats.

text.description: Source text to generate questions from

name: flashcard_generate
description: Generate study flashcards from text. Each card has front (term) and back (definition). Saves to JSON.

text.description: Source text to extract flashcards from

name: summary_generate
description: Summarize a long text using extractive summarization. Styles: concise, detailed, bullet.

name: concept_map_generate
description: Generate a concept map JSON from text — extracts key concepts and relationships for visualization.

text.description: Source text to build concept map from

name: load_test
description: Lightweight HTTP load test with concurrent requests. Returns avg/min/max time, errors, throughput.

name: log_analyzer
description: Analyze a log file: extract error patterns, top errors, frequency stats, and recommendations.

name: db_backup
description: Backup a SQLite database to a .sql dump file with all tables and INSERT statements.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

name: cache_check
description: Check HTTP cache headers for a URL: Cache-Control, ETag, TTL, CDN status, cache score.

url.description: URL to check cache headers on

name: table_generator
description: Generate perfectly formatted tables from headers + rows. Supports markdown, html, ascii/box, csv, tsv, json, rst. Handles column alignment (left/center/right), emoji-safe width, optional title, and file output.

rows.description: 2D array of row data. Each inner array = one row. Also accepts array-of-objects (keys auto-mapped to headers).

align.description: Per-column alignment array. Length must match headers. Default: all left.

output_path.description: Optional file path to save the rendered table

name: zip_extract
description: Extract a ZIP archive. Supports list-only, extract-all, extract specific files, pattern filter, password-protected ZIPs, and nested ZIP detection. Returns file tree with per-file metadata.

zip_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the .zip file

output_dir.description: Destination directory. Defaults to <zip_name>/ next to the archive.

mode.description: list=manifest only (no extract); extract_all=everything; extract_files=specific names; extract_pattern=regex filter. Default: extract_all

files.description: Exact member names to extract (used when mode=extract_files)

pattern.description: Regex pattern to filter members by filename (used when mode=extract_pattern)
